meaning: n.鱼钩,鱼叉的倒钩,巴巴里鸽(一种类似信鸽的鸽子)vt.装倒钩于
examples: The barb stung her exactly the way he hoped it would.
But please, just call me Barb.
Barack Obama assumed the barb was aimed at him.
In fact, throwing in a barb about a Chicago team has become his signature move.
Forest Service spokeswoman Barb Timock says some people were surprised the Mason fire ever got out of control.
